title: make fails: /go-md2man: No such file or directory - file is searched in wrong location
body:
```
$ git describe --always 
v1.11.6-1705-g954c4816

$ git status --ignored
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

nothing to commit, working tree clean

$ make
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=954c4816 -X main.buildInfo=1632998185 -X main.cniVersion=v0.8.1 ' -gcflags "" -o bin/buildah -tags "seccomp  btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_btrfs  " ./cmd/buildah
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=954c4816 -X main.buildInfo=1632998185 -X main.cniVersion=v0.8.1 ' -o bin/imgtype -tags "seccomp  btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_btrfs  " ./tests/imgtype/imgtype.go
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=954c4816 -X main.buildInfo=1632998185 -X main.cniVersion=v0.8.1 ' -o bin/copy -tags "seccomp  btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_btrfs  " ./tests/copy/copy.go
make -C tests/tools
make[1]: Entering directory '/git/containers/buildah/tests/tools'
make[1]: Leaving directory '/git/containers/buildah/tests/tools'
make -C docs
make[1]: Entering directory '/git/containers/buildah/docs'
/bin/sh: line 6: /go-md2man: No such file or directory
make[1]: *** [Makefile:16: buildah.1] Error 127
make[1]: Leaving directory '/git/containers/buildah/docs'
make: *** [Makefile:100: docs] Error 2

$ find -name go-md2man
./tests/tools/vendor/github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man
./tests/tools/build/go-md2man
```

comments.body:
This comes from a9e66ec72b55c7d2a854adca96:
```diff
diff --git a/docs/Makefile b/docs/Makefile
index 8fa61994..f063310c 100644
--- a/docs/Makefile
+++ b/docs/Makefile
@@ -1,19 +1,34 @@
 PREFIX := /usr/local
 DATADIR := ${PREFIX}/share
 MANDIR := $(DATADIR)/man
-GOMD2MAN ?= ../tests/tools/build/go-md2man
+GOMD2MAN ?= $(shell command -v go-md2man || echo '$(GOBIN)/go-md2man')
 
```
I mean, why is ./tests/tools/build/go-md2man created, if it is not used?

I think we should change it back to ` ./tests/tools/build/go-md2man` since its guaranteed to always exist or alteast fallback to `/tests/tools/build/go-md2man` if its not found on hosts `$GOBIN` @rhatdan WDYT ?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
